description: Offline QA benchmark — each entry is a packet dict and expected outcome.

entries.label: Claim backed by proof points passes

packet.technical_note: Acme uses custom CUDA kernels for inference.

outreach_drafts.email:
Hi Alice

I noticed your team's work on CUDA kernel optimization — we tackled similar memory layout challenges. Would love to compare notes.
outreach_drafts.linkedin_note: Love the kernel work — brief note on a shared optimization challenge.
outreach_drafts.connection_followup: Happy to share our approach if useful.

proof_points: Built a custom CUDA memory allocator

entries.label: Strong experience claim without proof is flagged

outreach_drafts.email:
Hi Bob

I built their entire deployment pipeline from scratch at my last company and can help you do the same.
outreach_drafts.linkedin_note: I deployed similar infra for a competitor.
outreach_drafts.connection_followup: Let me know if you need advice.

entries.label: Claims about the company with no URL backing are flagged

packet.technical_note: Acme is supposedly the leader in AI widgets but I could not find any evidence of this.

outreach_drafts.email:
Hi Carol

I read about Acme's AI widgets and wanted to connect.
outreach_drafts.linkedin_note: Heard great things about your widget team.

entries.label: People without verified evidence or source URLs are flagged

outreach_drafts.email:
Hi Dave

Your Kubernetes expertise sounds relevant to a project I'm working on.
outreach_drafts.linkedin_note: Kubernetes scaling is challenging — let's chat.
outreach_drafts.connection_followup: Always good to meet fellow K8s enthusiasts.
